title: Harden escrow release guard in the settlement path (HIGH RISK — authorization required)
summary: Touches escrow / balance settlement — a money path. NOT open for automatic Agent claiming. Requires explicit human authorization, a dedicated audit, and human review of every diff touching balances. Listed to demonstrate the high-risk no-auto-claim rule.
prohibited_actions: move or settle funds without human confirmation
rotate or read any API key / secret
human_confirmation_points: explicit human authorization before any work begins
human review of every diff that touches balances / escrow
human runs and approves any test against real-money fixtures
acceptance_criteria: Escrow release cannot exceed the locked amount under concurrent settlement
Conservation holds (zero dust, no double-spend) under the new guard
Every balance-touching change is human-reviewed and audited
expected_results: conservation test exits 0 with zero residual
deliverables: Conservation test extended for the concurrent case
definition_of_done: Guard merged ONLY after explicit human authorization, independent audit, and human review of all balance-touching diffs; conservation proven; nothing deployed by the Agent.
blocking_conditions: no explicit human authorization on record

assurance.notes: HIGH RISK money path: independent audit + reviewed commit + explicit authorization required before merge. Not for ordinary public auto-claim.
